questions.question: In SpongeBob SquarePants, what specific object does Mr. Krabs use to physically store and protect the written secret formula for the Krabby Patty?
What is the name of Aang's loyal, six-legged flying bison who serves as the primary mode of transportation for the group in Avatar: The Last Airbender?
What specific color is the liquid fluid used by Rick Sanchez to fuel his portal gun for interdimensional travel?
The Mystery Machine van features a distinctive floral paint job consisting of which three primary colors?
What is the name of Eric Cartman's absolute favorite stuffed animal, a green frog that he regularly holds tea parties with?
Wile E. Coyote orders all of his explosive gadgets, traps, and complex machinery from which fictional mail-order corporation?
What specific number is written on the front of the mysterious, six-fingered handprint journal that Dipper Pines discovers in the woods?
Perry the Platypus works as a secret agent under the command of Major Monogram. What is the acronym of the global spy organization he belongs to?
Finn the Human's signature white headgear is canonically designed to mimic the head and ears of what specific animal?
Danny Fenton gains his supernatural ghost powers after stepping inside a portal created by his eccentric parents. What is the name of this portal?
In a famous, mostly silent underwater episode of BoJack Horseman, BoJack travels to the Pacific Ocean to promote his film Secretariat at which fictional film festival?
What specific shade of color is the exterior hull of Professor Farnsworth's Planet Express delivery spaceship?
Helga Pataki keeps a massive, hidden love shrine dedicated to Arnold in the back of her bedroom closet. What perishable everyday item is the core structure of the shrine primarily constructed from?
Tommy Pickles frequently escapes his playpen and breaks into restricted areas by hiding what specific household tool inside his diaper?
Hank Hill takes immense professional pride in working as an assistant manager for which retail propane and propane accessories company?
What is the official cosmic name of the orange-skinned alien princess Starfire's tropical home planet?
Timmy Turner famously wears a pink hat and shirt because the show's creator Butch Hartman ran out of what specific color ink while drawing the character?
What is the first name of Dexter's tall, hyperactive, ballet-loving older sister who constantly breaks into his high-tech hidden facility?
The three Eds spend their entire summer creating complex scams to swindle the neighborhood kids out of money. How many cents does a single massive jawbreaker cost at the candy store?
Professor Utonium creates the Powerpuff Girls by mixing sugar, spice, and everything nice, but he accidentally knocks what catastrophic fourth element into the concoction?
What is the name of the ancient, shapeshifting master of darkness who flings Samurai Jack into the distant future in the show's opening sequence?
Tina Belcher spends much of her free time writing graphic, dramatic stories that she categorizes under what specific hybrid literary genre?
What is the first name of Huey and Riley's cantankerous, eccentric grandfather who moves the brothers from Chicago to the suburbs of Woodcrest?
Mordecai and Rigby work as lazy groundskeepers at a local public park. What is the name of their short-tempered, anthropomorphic gumball machine boss?
Steven Universe inherits a magical, pink defensive gemstone weapon embedded in his bellybutton from his mother. What specific type of weapon is it?
Ron Stoppable carries a specialized, pink pocket pet inside his mission pants throughout Kim Possible. What is the name of this naked mole rat?
The main cast of Codename: Kids Next Door operates out of a massive, high-tech treehouse complex. What specific letter designation represents their local neighborhood sector?
Zim's malfunctioning, hyperactive robot servant GIR frequently goes out in public wearing a poorly stitched green zipper suit designed to look like what animal?
In Foster's Home for Imaginary Friends, the simple, blue, dome-shaped friend Mac Blooey (Bloo) was physically imagined into existence by which main human character?
In the 1990s animated cult comedy The Critic, film reviewer Jay Sherman routinely summarizes his absolute disdain for terrible cinema with what iconic two-word catchphrase?
Ahsoka Tano is discovered by Plo Koon and recruited into the Jedi Order from her tropical native planet of Shili. What is the name of her sentient alien species?
Stan Smith works as an elite field agent for the Central Intelligence Agency in Langley Falls. What is the first name of his eccentric, high-ranking boss, Deputy Director Smith?
The sadistic, narcissistic host of the animated reality show parody Total Drama Island subjects the teenage contestants to extreme physical tortures. What is his first name?
After waking up from a thousand-year stone slumber in Manhattan, Goliath and his ancient clan establish their primary nighttime defensive roost atop what specific building?
In the pioneering CGI animated series ReBoot, the heroic Guardian Bob arrives from the Supercomputer to protect Mainframe. What is Bob's official registry number?
The genetically altered laboratory mice Pinky and the Brain spend every single night planning global domination inside which specific scientific research facility?
The formidable secret agent and bodyguard Brock Samson takes immense pride in his iconic, rumbling 1969 muscle car. What specific make and model vehicle is it?

Meatwad possesses unique, highly flexible molecular structure allowing him to shape-shift into various physical forms, though he almost always limits himself to an igloo or what hotdog-stand food item?
Virgil Hawkins gains his signature electromagnetic abilities after being exposed to a highly toxic, experimental gas during a gang riot. What is this street event commonly called?
The Planeteer Ma-Ti wields the power of Heart to communicate telepathically and soothe animals. What is the name of his mischievous pet spider monkey who travels with him?
In the opening multi-part episode of X-Men: The Animated Series, which team member is tragically left behind and presumed dead after a Sentinel ambush at a Mutant Control facility?
Eliza Thornberry travels the world in a comically outfitted RV with her family and her sophisticated, shirt-wearing companion Darwin. What kind of animal is Darwin?
The muscle-bound, pompadour-wearing Johnny Bravo spends his days failing to pick up women in which fictional, ironically named city?
Ginger Foutley and her tight-knit circle of friends navigate the intense social hierarchies and emotional minefields of which fictional junior high school?
The cynical blue mouse Winslow T. Oddfellow resides inside a small mousehole in CatDog's home, which features a tiny door painted what specific color?
T.J. Detweiler, the charismatic prankster leader of the Third Street Elementary School playground, is easily recognized by his signature backwards red cap and what color varsity jacket?
The internationally acclaimed children's animated series Bluey showcases the daily imaginative play of the Heeler family living in which major Australian city?
Scrooge McDuck keeps his very first earned coin mounted on a velvet pillow under glass inside his money bin. What is this iconic artifact called?
Throughout their journey through the Unknown, Greg changes his pet frog's name dozens of times before finally settling on what formal, historical human name in the finale?
In a memorable Gravity Falls investigation, Mabel crafts a lifesize wax replica of Grunkle Stan, which is tragically decapitated by a mysterious thief looking for what hidden artifact?
In the cult animated comedy Clone High, the teenage clone of Mahatma Gandhi serves as the ultimate party animal, frequently shouting what signature nonsense catchphrase?
In the animated Beetlejuice series, Lydia Deetz spends her time in the Neitherworld with her best friend, a skeleton who is obsessed with fitness and body-building. What is his name?
Wilt is a gentle, incredibly helpful red imaginary friend who wears a single blue sneaker and sports what specific number on his basketball jersey?
The structural, wood-chewing brothers Daggett and Norbert Doofus build their bachelor pad dam in a forest located in which specific U.S. state?
The vigilante pilots of the Turbokat jet, T-Bone and Razor, maintain their secret identities by running what type of mundane public business?
On the surreal adult swim talk show Space Ghost Coast to Coast, what is the name of the mantis-like alien villain who acts as the show's reluctant musical bandleader?
The elder gargoyle Hudson adapts to 1990s Manhattan life primarily by spending his nights relaxing in the armchair doing what human activity?
In the animated Harley Quinn series, Ivy's early love interest Kite Man frequently announces his arrival and general enthusiasm with what repetitive four-word catchphrase?
Daria's superficial, hyper-popular younger sister Quinn serves as the vice president of which high school extracurricular organization at Lawndale High?
The Grim Reaper is forced to become the eternal best friend of Billy and Mandy after losing a game over the soul of Billy's sick pet hamster. What was the hamster's name?
The young, purple-clad apprentice Chowder learns the culinary arts in the magical Marzipan City under the strict guidance of which master chef?
Aaahh!!! Real Monsters tracks young scares-in-training navigating the structural sewers of New York City under the strict tutelage of their multi-legged, high-heeled headmaster. What is his name?
The Tick's anxious, sidekick partner Arthur flies around the city fighting crime in a specialized white tactical outfit that people constantly mistake for what insect?
Marceline the Vampire Queen plays a distinct, dark red electric bass guitar that was physically modified from what ancient, family heirloom object?
Zim's human classmate and mortal enemy Dib Membrane is completely obsessed with tracking aliens and frequently watches what fictional television program?
questions.answer: Mysterious Mysteries of Strange Unexplained Things

questions.question: The extreme sports kids of Ocean Shores routinely unwind after skating sessions by eating burgers at a beachside establishment run by Tito Makani. What is the shack's name?
Whenever Courage needs assistance diagnosing supernatural phenomena in Nowhere, Kansas, he seeks advice from an interactive machine in the attic. How does the machine talk to him?
In the 1990s adult animated series Duckman, the abrasive, yellow web-footed private eye relies entirely on his highly competent, silent pig partner to solve cases. What is the pig's name?
In Rocko's Modern Life, Rocko's gluttonous, cheerful best friend Heffer Wolfe is a steer who was ironically adopted and raised by what specific family of predatory animals?
Samurai Jack forms a powerful, competitive alliance with an aggressive warrior known simply as The Scotsman, who wields an enormous broadsword enchanted with what specific symbols?
The fraudulent, white-haired child psychic Lil' Gideon operates his telepathic business rivaling the Mystery Shack out of what temporary, indoor theater structure?
Skips is a wise, immortal yeti working at the park who maintains his eternal life by performing a highly specific ceremonial dance on his birthday every year around what object?
The shapeshifting alien siblings Zan and Jayna trigger their supernatural elemental transformations by touching hands, often accompanied by their blue space monkey companion. What is his name?
Johnny 2x4 travels everywhere in the cul-de-sac with his completely silent, inanimate best friend named Plank. What physical item is Plank made of?
When SpongeBob crafts a temporary friend out of soap bubbles named Bubble Buddy, the companion causes absolute chaos at the Goo Lagoon by leaving a man to drown for how many hours?
Which real-life, Emmy-winning actress plays a heavily weaponized, crime-committing, fictionalized version of herself as a recurring character in BoJack Horseman?
Danny's billionaire arch-nemesis, Vlad Masters (Vlad Plasmius), uses his vast wealth to purchase which real-world NFL professional football team?
Whenever the Scooby-Doo gang gets ambushed or knocked down by a monster, Velma Dinkley routinely crawls along the floor blindly searching for what specific item?
Before joining Aang's team as his Earthbending teacher, Toph Beifong dominates an underground bending tournament circuit under what theatrical wrestling pseudonym?
What is the name of the sweet, chocolate-flavored confectionary snack that Chef sings a famously suggestive, chart-topping song about to the children?
Dexter's favorite comic book superhero team "The Justice Friends" features a highly patriotic leader who wields a magical shield that is actually a garbage can lid. What is his name?
Johnny Bravo's daily muscle-flexing routines are constantly disrupted by an incredibly talkative, highly intelligent 8-year-old neighbor girl. What is her first name?
Planet Express bureaucrat Hermes Conrad proudly represented Jamaica in the 2980 Earth Olympics in which highly flexible, gravity-defying athletic sport?
The magical, insanity-inducing ice crown worn by the Ice King was originally constructed in the ancient past by a powerful, element-controlling wizard named what?
Dr. Heinz Doofenshmirtz's tragic childhood backstories reveal that his parents forced him to dress up and stand motionless in the yard to act as what household object?
The babies are completely obsessed with eating the fictional, movie-monster-themed grocery store cereal "Reptar Crunch," which features what specific physical marketing gimmick?
Roger the Alien utilizes hundreds of elaborate disguises to live among humans, but his most infamous, ruthless, and recurring persona is a corrupt persona named what?
Timmy Turner's absolute favorite comic book superhero, The Crimson Chin, spends his nights leaping across buildings to protect which fictional U.S. metropolis?
Jay Sherman's megalomaniacal, multi-billionaire media boss Duke Phillips runs a commercial airline company that boasts what terrifyingly honest safety slogan?
Bob Belcher treats his holiday meat preparation with borderline religious reverence. In a classic episode, he spends days talking to a fresh bird he names what?
The structural social hierarchy of the Third Street Elementary playground is ruled by the authoritarian sixth-grader King Bob, who sits atop a throne constructed from what?
questions.answer: A junkyard couch on a scaffold

questions.question: The Kids Next Door organization fights a supreme, shadow-wielding adult supervillain named Father, who is eventually revealed to have what exact biological relation to Numbuh One?
Virgil's tech-genius partner Richie Foley (Gear) fights crime alongside a highly intelligent, hovering sphere robot he engineered. What is the robot's name?
In the early episodes of Samurai Jack, Jack saves a sophisticated colony of talking canine archaeologists who are being forced to mine gems by Aku. What specific breed of dog are they?
The unhinged director of Clone High, Principal Scudworth, resides with a sarcastic, vintage-style robot butler who refers to everyone as "Wesley." What is the robot's name?
While Zorak conducts the studio band, which metallic, helmet-wearing lava villain monitors the recording screens and coordinates the satellite feeds from the control room?
The incredibly incompetent, short-statured Mayor of Townsville routinely ignores catastrophic monster invasions because he is completely distracted by eating what specific jarred snack?
Sam "The Squid" Dullard initially struggles to adapt to the fast-paced surfing and skating lifestyle of Ocean Shores, California, because he just moved from which tech-heavy Midwestern city?
The wood-chopping Woodsman is tricked into keeping the Beast's dark lantern burning because he erroneously believes it physically contains the soul of whom?
Squidward Tentacles' highly recognizable, deep-blue residential building in Bikini Bottom is structurally designed to look like what real-world Pacific island architectural monument?
What is the first name of SpongeBob SquarePants' pink starfish best friend who lives under a rock?
What pink-frosted, sprinkled bakery item is Homer Simpson's absolute favorite food?
Scooby-Doo's green-shirted, sandwich-loving human best friend is called Shaggy, but what is his actual first name?
What electric-type mouse creature is Ash Ketchum's primary partner and global mascot of the franchise?
Which main South Park character wears a tightly buttoned orange parka that completely muffles his voice?
What is the name of the exiled Fire Nation prince tracking Aang to restore his honor?
What is the first name of the hyper-intelligent, football-headed baby who wants to take over the world?
Rick Sanchez frequently brags that he originates from what alphanumeric baseline dimension?
What is the first name of Phineas and Ferb's older sister who spends every day trying to bust them?
What is the first name of Hank and Peggy Hill's prop-comedy-loving, unique 13-year-old son?
Finn's yellow, shapeshifting adoptive brother and best friend Jake belongs to what animal species?
What is the name of the prize-winning pet pig that Mabel Pines adopts at the Mystery Fair?
Louise Belcher is never seen without her signature pink headgear, which features the ears of what animal?
What crunchy orange vegetable does Bugs Bunny constantly chomp on while asking "What's up, doc?"
Timmy Turner's two primary floating fairy godparents are named Wanda and what?
When Prince Adam transforms into He-Man, his cowardly green tiger Cringer turns into what armored beast?
The bumbling Planet Express delivery boy Fry is known by his last name, but what is his first name?
Which specific martial arts weapon consisting of two sticks connected by a short chain is wielded by Michelangelo?
What is the name of Inspector Gadget's highly intelligent niece who actually solves all of his cases?
The neat-freak, sock-hat-wearing member of the trio is called Double D, but what is his actual name?
What is the first name of the socially awkward cartoonist who owns Garfield the cat and Odie the dog?
What is the name of the robotic, apron-wearing live-in maid who takes care of the Jetson family?
What is the name of Fred and Wilma Flintstone's energetic, barking purple pet prosauropod dinosaur?
Arthur Read is a popular PBS schoolchild wearing round glasses, but what specific animal species is he?
What is the name of Christopher Robin's gloomy, thistle-eating stuffed donkey friend who constantly loses his tail?
